title: senecio covuncensis
intro: Senecio covuncensis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae, and is commonly known as a type of ragwort. The medicinal properties of Senecio covuncensis lie in its ability to act as a bitter tonic and astringent, which can help to stimulate digestive function and alleviate symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Senecio covuncensis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
